title: Classroom operations dashboard, anomaly lifecycle, real-time Socket.IO
key_decisions: Repo refactor applied: nginx reverse-proxy container removed; frontend nginx now proxies /api/* and /socket.io/* to backend:3000; frontend exposed on :80, backend on :3000
Unit tests relocated: repo/unit_tests/services/* → repo/backend/unit_tests/* (path fixes applied); repo/unit_tests/ deleted
AnomalyTimelineEntry model added to Prisma schema; AnomalyEvent.timeline relation added
Anomaly state machine: open → acknowledged → assigned → resolved | any-active → escalated
Resolution note enforced at schema level: z.string().min(10) — cannot be bypassed by API callers
Heartbeat worker (real): marks classrooms offline if lastHeartbeatAt > 90s stale, creates node_offline anomaly if none exists
Escalation worker (real): auto-escalates anomalies in open/acknowledged status after 30 min (config.classroom.anomalyEscalationMinutes)
Both workers replace the stub workers that were in registerWorkerStubs()
Heartbeat endpoint POST /api/classrooms/heartbeat/:nodeId uses JWT auth (production: would use HMAC with IntegrationKey)
ClassroomOperationsView: real-time grid with Socket.IO /classroom namespace; card status updates in-place without reload
AnomalyQueueView: table with inline state-transition buttons; Socket.IO real-time updates; resolve dialog blocks submit until note ≥ 10 chars
Timeline drawer: click any anomaly row to see full event history (acknowledge, assign, resolve, escalate, auto_escalate entries)
Escalate pushes to both /classroom namespace (anomaly:updated) and /supervisor-queue namespace (anomaly:escalated)
files_created: backend/src/modules/classroom/anomaly.service.ts (listAnomalies, getAnomalyById, createAnomaly, acknowledge, assign, resolve, escalate, escalateStaleAnomalies)
frontend/src/views/classroom/AnomalyQueueView.vue (table, state buttons, resolve dialog, timeline drawer)
backend/unit_tests/classroom.test.ts (state machine, schema validation, heartbeat schema)
files_updated: backend/src/jobs/index.ts (heartbeat.worker imported; heartbeat+escalation removed from stubs)
backend/src/app.ts (cors: origin=true; trust proxy removed — no nginx reverse proxy)
frontend/nginx.conf (added /api/ and /socket.io/ proxy blocks to backend:3000)
docker-compose.yml (nginx service removed; frontend ports 80:80; backend ports 3000:3000; certs-data volume removed)
backend/unit_tests/auth.test.ts (moved from repo/unit_tests/services/, import path fixed)

emitted_by_backend: anomaly:created — new anomaly created (manual or by heartbeat worker)
supervisor_queue: anomaly:escalated — pushed when escalate() or auto-escalation fires

next_prompt: Prompt 6 — Parking operations dashboard (space counts, turnover stats, exception alerts with 15-min SLA, supervisor escalation queue, real-time Socket.IO /parking namespace)
